name: Sopa De Ajo Al Horno (Garlic Soup)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
2. Add the garlic cloves and fry until golden brown.
3. Remove the garlic with a slotted spoon and discard it.
4. Place the bread cubes in individual oven dishes.
5. Pour water into each dish, covering the bread.
6. Put the dishes in a preheated oven (350°F/175°C) and bake until the bread is lightly browned.
7. Carefully add one egg at a time to the soup, stirring gently after each addition.
8. Return the dishes to the oven and cook until the eggs are set.
9. Season with salt to taste.
10. Serve hot.
